name: rabbit-issue
summary: GitHub Issues wrapper for filing, listing, and lifecycle-managing bugs and enhancements via the `gh` CLI. Replaces rabbit-file's retired branch-backed item store with native GH Issues; the rabbit-managed label gates rabbit's automation from touching human-filed issues.
deprecation_criterion: when GH Issues is replaced or the workflow moves to a different tracker; revisit when claude-plugins-official ships a GH Issues skill
spec_no_change_reason: housekeeping removal pass (#686): md-only dead-prose deletion; test surface unchanged per md-only mandate, existing e2e suite pins all preserved behaviors
